name: medical-microservices
description: Online medical appointment backend — npm workspaces; one install at repo root

scripts.start: concurrently -k -n US,DS,AS,PS,GW -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green,blue "npm run start -w user-service" "npm run start -w doctor-service" "npm run start -w appointment-service" "npm run start -w payment-service" "npm run start -w api-gateway"
scripts.start:services-only: concurrently -n US,DS,AS,PS -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green "npm run start -w user-service" "npm run start -w doctor-service" "npm run start -w appointment-service" "npm run start -w payment-service"
